title.description: The title displayed at the top of the shopping list page.

image_url.description: URL of an image to display on the shopping list page.

link_type.description: The type of product link to create.

expires_in.description: The number of seconds until the generated link expires.

instructions.description: Additional instructions or notes to display on the page.

line_items.description: The list of products to include on the shopping list page.

landing_page_configuration.description: Configuration options for the landing page appearance and behavior.

partner_linkback_url.description: URL to link back to the partner site from the landing page.
